global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on a travel offer.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for weekend getaways.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: A prominent logo at the top of the ad, featuring the word 'DriftPass' in bold, modern typography.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bright yellow badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold letters.

elements.label: Weekend escape offer
elements.description: A large, bold headline in the center of the ad that reads 'Escape this weekend' with a slightly smaller subtext below it.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Special fares today

elements.label: Special fares text
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that states 'Special fares today' in a clean, readable font.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent call-to-action button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Book now' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Abstract shapes in the background, including a large rectangle and a circle, adding visual interest without distracting from the text.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold typography, DriftPass logo, weekend escape offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, body text below it, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Escape this weekend, Special fares today, DriftPass, SALE, Book now
